vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup passwd File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/passwd-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/passwd-

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only changes file permissions on a backup copy of /etc/passwd, which does not affect authentication mechanisms or system boot. Adjusting permissions to 0644 is a standard STIG practice and poses minimal risk of lockout or service disruption.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Incorrect permission could expose backup file contents; Potential mis‑application if path is wrong
